title: HatchingGroundSession
description: A Hatching Ground UI harness session. All fields are optional to support partial in-progress sessions.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier (e.g. ISO timestamp + short slug).

project_or_life_area.description: Domain or life area the idea belongs to (e.g. writing, home, work tooling).

goal.description: What the user is trying to accomplish.

friction.description: Recurring problem or friction driving the idea.

constraints.description: Time, skill, cost, or privacy constraints.

privacy_notes.description: Notes on what data is involved and sensitivity level.

preferred_build_style.description: How the user prefers to build (e.g. file-first, scripts, local-only).

rough_idea.description: The raw unstructured idea before processing.

clutch_input.description: Multiple candidate ideas for clutch scoring.

generated_prompt.description: The prompt bundle generated for this session, ready to paste into Claude or GPT.

model_output.description: The model response pasted back into the harness.

validation_summary.description: Results from heuristic validation of the model output.

artifacts.description: Artifact references exported from this session.
